title: lithocardium mucronatum
intro: Lithocardium mucronatum, also known as Lithospermum mucronatum or Glaucium mucronatum, is a flowering plant species in the family Papaveraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as relieving respiratory issues and reducing inflammation. The herbal preparations of Lithocardium mucronatum include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed orally or used topically for various health applications.
